raw:
I'll do real recon on the changed files to verify the work fulfills the task intent.
Let me examine the relevant files directly.
Good signs. Let me read the reader.ts enrichment and format functions in detail.
reader.ts is thorough and pure. Now let me check index.ts wiring and view.ts.
The index.ts wiring looks correct. Now let me check the ctrl+b/ctrl+f handlers and view.ts dashboard changes.
Both shortcuts pass sessionId. Now let me check pushStatus is called on phase transitions and view.ts dashboard changes.
pushStatus called on transitions. Now view.ts dashboard.
All deliverable 2 features present: owner badge, picker header "N tasks · K yours", sort, 'm' mine-only filter, root owner badge, agent live header. Let me verify the 'm' key handler and check the constructor stores sessionId.
Now let me verify the test file extensions to confirm they're real assertions, not cheats, and check reader.ts purity (no pi/TUI imports).
The tests are genuine and comprehensive. Let me check the sortForPicker assertions and run the verify command.
Sort test asserts running→gate→done with yours-first. Now run the verify command.
All verify commands pass. Let me confirm no out-of-scope changes to forbidden files (loop control, gates schema, ledger writers). The diff showed gates.ts, ledger.ts, done.ts, ship.ts changed — but those are from other commits in the HEAD~5 range. Let me isolate the task-relevant commit.
The diff range included unrelated prior commits. Let me check whether the task work is committed or in the working tree, and verify the actual scope of changes for this task.
Working-tree changes are scoped exactly to the four allowed files: `reader.ts`, `reader_test.sh`, `view.ts`, `index.ts` (plus runtime `.pi/plans` ledger data). Let me confirm index.ts changes are only statusline/sessionId wiring, not loop control.
All index.ts changes are confined to statusline/sessionId wiring — no loop control touched. The single-line `setStatus(STATUS_KEY,…)` footer is fully replaced by `setWidget` panel, and `DIRECT_STATUS_KEY` direct-edit status is preserved (index.ts:967,970).

Everything checks out across both deliverables:

**Deliverable 1 (STATUSLINE → panel)** ✓
- reader.ts: `deriveTranscriptLiveInfo` derives liveAction/toolCount/ctxTokens/elapsedMs purely & defensively (reader.ts:488-525); `buildStatuslineModel` stays sessionId-scoped (reader.ts:567); `formatStatusPanel` renders branded `─ FOREMAN` title with collapsed done count, attention-ordered blocks, spinner+badge+round+elapsed, indented `↳` sub-line, gate "needs you: ship?", escalated "stuck", `+K more`, ≤7 lines (reader.ts:746-790).
- index.ts: `setWidget(STATUS_KEY, …, {placement:"aboveEditor"})` on transitions + 120ms ticker, clears with `undefined` when empty, no-UI guard, second-granularity elapsed (index.ts:1084-1108).

**Deliverable 2 (DASHBOARD session ownership)** ✓
- sessionId threaded via both ctrl+b/ctrl+f (index.ts:981,996), stored on component (view.ts:162).
- Owner badge "● yours"/"session abc123"/"—" (view.ts:570-574), picker header "N tasks · K yours" + "mine only" (view.ts:473), `sortForPicker` attention+yours-first (reader.ts:793), 'm' mine-only toggle (view.ts:266), root owner badge (view.ts:503), live agent header with liveAction/elapsed/tools (view.ts:576-582).

**Constraints** ✓ — reader.ts pure (node-builtins only, reader.ts:8-9); blast radius limited to the 4 allowed files; defensive try/catch returning safe defaults; tests are genuine (seed real transcripts/ledgers, assert derived fields, collapsed done, session exclusion, spinner animation, sort order) — no hardcoding or test-gaming.

Verify command passes (re-ran reader+ledger+gates+fallback all green).

VERDICT: PASS
